g.onclick: sendPrompt('What triggers a GitHub Actions workflow?')
sendPrompt('What is a GitHub Actions workflow file?')
sendPrompt('What is OIDC and how does GitHub use it to get AWS credentials?')
sendPrompt('What is the GitHub OIDC role and what can it do?')

g.text: triggered on push to main · uses GitHub role via OIDC

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What Jest tests run in the CI pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub Actions build a Docker image?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub Actions authenticate to ECR?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub Actions update the ECS service?')
sendPrompt('What is Amazon ECR and what is stored there?')
sendPrompt('Why does ECS Fargate need an ALB?')
sendPrompt('How does internet traffic reach ECS Fargate containers?')
sendPrompt('What is an ECS task definition?')
sendPrompt('Why does ECS run two tasks by default?')
sendPrompt('What does Container Insights monitor in ECS?')
sendPrompt('What CloudWatch alarms fire during a failed deploy?')

svg.text: GitHub role — assumed by GitHub Actions via OIDC to push ECR + update ECS
Execution role — assumed by ECS control plane to pull images + write log streams
Task role — assumed by running container code to write logs + read SSM parameters
